topic_info.Name: -1_table_including_lists_table lists
Representative_Docs: This table lists changes in U.S. Senate seats during the 111th Congress, including the state, vacator, reason for the change, successor, and installation date.

This table records changes in representatives during the 13th United States Congress, including the district affected, the vacator, the reason for the change, the successor, and the installation date of the successor.

This table documents changes in representation during the 18th United States Congress, including the congressional district affected, the vacator, the reason for the change, the successor, and the date of the successor's formal installation.

topic_info.Name: 0_tour_new_rugby_zealand
Representative_Docs: This table lists players from the 1903 New Zealand rugby union tour of Australia, including their playing positions and provinces they represented.
This table records details of the 1903 New Zealand rugby union tour of Australia, including game numbers, dates, opposing teams, cities, venues, and scores.
This table records details of matches from the 1884 New Zealand rugby union tour in New South Wales, including match numbers, dates, opposing teams, cities, venues, and scores.

topic_info.Name: 1_country_international_results_lists results
Representative_Docs: This table lists results from the 1924 International Cross Country Championships, showing athletes' ranks, names, nationalities, and race times.
This table lists the results of the 1921 International Cross Country Championships, including the rank, athlete name, nationality, and race time for participants.
This table lists the results of the 1923 International Cross Country Championships, including the rank, athlete name, nationality, and time for each participant.

topic_info.Name: 2_assembly_term_political parties_parties
Representative_Docs: This table lists members of the 129th Ohio General Assembly, including their senatorial districts, political parties, residences, years first elected, and term limit status.
This table lists members of the 128th Ohio General Assembly, including their districts, political parties, residences, election years, and term limit status.
This table lists members of the 130th Ohio General Assembly, including their district numbers, names, political parties, residences, election years, and term limit status.

topic_info.Name: 3_political_districts_members_lists members
Representative_Docs: This table lists members of the 15th Legislative Assembly of Puerto Rico, including their names, political parties, and electoral districts. It provides information on senators' affiliations and geographic representation.
This table lists members of the 10th Manitoba Legislature, their electoral districts, and their political parties. It provides information on the Legislative Assembly of Manitoba from 1899 to 1914.
This table lists members of the 17th Manitoba Legislature, their electoral districts, and their political parties. It provides information on the legislators who served during the 1922-1935 period.

topic_info.Name: 4_college_number_players_1948
Representative_Docs: This table lists the 1948 BAA draft selections, including the round and pick number for each player, their position, the team that selected them, and their college affiliation.

This table lists the 1948 BAA draft selections, including the draft round, pick number, player name, position, team, and college attended. It provides a historical record of players selected in the draft along with their associated teams and educational backgrounds.

This table lists the 1947 BAA draft selections, including the draft round, pick number, player name, position, team, and college attended. It provides historical data on players drafted into professional basketball.

topic_info.Name: 5_films_includes_production_title
Representative_Docs: This table lists films from 1957, including their country of origin, title, director, studio, revenue, and admissions data. It provides information on the financial and cultural impact of films released that year.

This table lists 40 films from 1974 with their rankings, titles, production studios, and domestic box office earnings. It includes notable entries like 'Blazing Saddles' and provides financial data alongside studio information.

This table lists films from 1954 with details on their international market, revenue, admissions, and production countries. It includes information on the studios involved and the financial performance of each film.

topic_info.Name: 6_race_including year_location_event
Representative_Docs: This table records 1500 metres race results, including the year of the event, the recorded time, the athlete's name, and the location where the race took place. It contains 64 entries spanning multiple years with associated performance data.
This table records results from 10,000 metres athletic events, including the year of the event, race time, athlete name, and competition location.

This table records results from 10,000 metres track and field events, including the year of the event, race time, athlete name, and competition location. It contains 80 rows of historical race data with associated metadata.

topic_info.Name: 7_record_time_1500 metres_1500
Representative_Docs: This table tracks the progression of 1500 metres world records, listing the time achieved, the athlete who set the record, the date it was set, and the location. It provides a historical overview of improvements in this athletic event.

This table tracks the progression of the 1500 metres world record over time, listing the recorded time, athlete name, date of achievement, and location. It documents improvements in the record through historical data entries.

This table tracks the progression of 1500 metres world records over time, listing the recorded time, athlete name, date of achievement, and location. Each row represents a new record set by an athlete.

topic_info.Name: 8_college_football_recognized_including positions
Representative_Docs: This table lists the 1939 College Football All-America Team members, including their positions, schools, jersey numbers, official designations, and other categories. It contains 72 players with details on their roles and affiliations.

This table lists the 1935 College Football All-America Team members, including their positions, schools, and additional classifications. It provides historical data on standout college football players recognized that year.

This table lists the 1943 College Football All-America Team members, including their positions, schools, jersey numbers, and selectors. It provides a historical record of recognized college football players and their affiliations.

topic_info.Name: 9_installation_congressional_changes_congress including
Representative_Docs: This table records changes in U.S. congressional representation during the 105th Congress, including the district affected, the vacating representative, the reason for the change, their successor, and the installation date.

This table lists changes in representation during the 107th United States Congress, including congressional districts, vacators, reasons for seat changes, successors, and installation dates. It documents 60 instances of vacancies and replacements, with details on the districts affected and the formal installation dates of successors.

This table documents changes in congressional representation during the 102nd United States Congress, including the district affected, the vacator, reason for the change, successor, and installation date.

topic_info.Name: 10_successors_vacating_vacancies successors_installation

The table lists changes in U.S. Senate seats during the 10th Congress, including the state, the vacating senator, the reason for the change, the successor, and the installation date.
